plan.canceledNotice: You canceled the payment. You can try again whenever you like — your details are still saved.

processorNotReady.mpTitle: Mercado Pago isn't configured in this environment yet.
processorNotReady.stripeTitle: Stripe isn't configured in this environment yet.
processorNotReady.body: We're finishing connecting this payment method. In the meantime you can try <altLink>{altLabel}</altLink>, or write to us at <supportEmail>info@ballershub.co</supportEmail> and we'll let you know when it's ready.

processing.title: Processing your payment
processing.statusTakingLonger: This is taking a little longer than usual…
processing.secureNote: Your payment is being verified securely.
processing.doNotCloseNote: Don't close this window. We'll take you to the confirmation as soon as it's ready.

success.title: All set! Your <shimmer>{plan}</shimmer> plan is active
success.intro: We've sent the details to your email. Your {trialDays}-day trial started today and you can cancel free of charge anytime within 3 days of the first charge.

summary.emailNote: If you don't see the confirmation email within 5 minutes, write to us at <supportEmail>info@ballershub.co</supportEmail>.

success.processingFallback: We're finishing processing your payment. This may take a few seconds.
success.onboardingNote: Your subscription is active. To start using it we need a few more details about you — it takes 2-3 minutes.

failure.title: We couldn't process your payment
failure.defaultBody: The processor declined the transaction. You weren't charged. Try another card or payment method — your details are still saved.

reasons.insufficientAmount: The card doesn't have sufficient funds. Try another method or contact your bank.
reasons.badFilledCard: The card details aren't correct. Check the number, the expiration date and the security code, then try again.
reasons.highRisk: The processor flagged a risk on the transaction. Try another card or contact your bank to authorize the charge.

pending.title: We're processing your payment
pending.body: Some methods (cash, bank transfer, debit in Argentina) take a few minutes to confirm. We'll send you an email as soon as it clears — there's nothing else you need to do.

receipt.supportLine: Cancelable free of charge within 3 days of the charge. For support: <supportEmail>info@ballershub.co</supportEmail>.
